first_paragraph: The [snowboarding](/wiki/Snowboarding "Snowboarding") competition of the [1998 Winter Olympics](/wiki/1998_Winter_Olympics "1998 Winter Olympics") was held at [Mount Yakebitai](/wiki/Mount_Yakebitai "Mount Yakebitai") and [Kanbayashi Snowboard Park](/wiki/Kanbayashi_Snowboard_Park "Kanbayashi Snowboard Park"). The competition took place between 8 and 12 February 1998 and featured four events: Men's and Women's [giant slalom](/wiki/Giant_slalom "Giant slalom") and [halfpipe](/wiki/Halfpipe#snow_sports "Halfpipe").[[1]](#cite_note-OfficialReport-1)[[2]](#cite_note-SR-2)

| * [v](/wiki/Template:Snowboarding_at_the_1998_Winter_Olympics "Template:Snowboarding at the 1998 Winter Olympics") * [t](/wiki/Template_talk:Snowboarding_at_the_1998_Winter_Olympics "Template talk:Snowboarding at the 1998 Winter Olympics") * [e](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Template:Snowboarding_at_the_1998_Winter_Olympics "Special:EditPage/Template:Snowboarding at the 1998 Winter Olympics") | | |

The [snowboarding](/wiki/Snowboarding "Snowboarding") competition of the [1998 Winter Olympics](/wiki/1998_Winter_Olympics "1998 Winter Olympics") was held at [Mount Yakebitai](/wiki/Mount_Yakebitai "Mount Yakebitai") and [Kanbayashi Snowboard Park](/wiki/Kanbayashi_Snowboard_Park "Kanbayashi Snowboard Park"). The competition took place between 8 and 12 February 1998 and featured four events: Men's and Women's [giant slalom](/wiki/Giant_slalom "Giant slalom") and [halfpipe](/wiki/Halfpipe#snow_sports "Halfpipe").[[1]](#cite_note-OfficialReport-1)[[2]](#cite_note-SR-2)

This was the first Olympic appearance of snowboarding. Although a separate [snowboard federation](/wiki/International_Snowboard_Federation "International Snowboard Federation") was established in 1994, the [International Ski Federation](/wiki/International_Ski_Federation "International Ski Federation") brought snowboard under its jurisdiction with encouragement from the [IOC](/wiki/IOC "IOC").[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Participating nations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Snowboarding_at_the_1998_Winter_Olympics&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Participating nations")]

Twenty-two nations participated in snowboarding at the Nagano Games.[[1]](#cite_note-OfficialReport-1)
